app.title: Group Pay
app.subtitle: Split the bill. No math at the table.

bill.title: > BILL_TOTAL
bill.hint: Enter the full amount on the receipt.

toasts.linkCopied: Link copied — bookmark to save session

steps.title: ① Bill total
steps.description: Type the full receipt amount. This stays pinned at the top.

steps.title: ② Confirm
steps.description: Lock in the total and move to the next step.

steps.title: ③ Who ate?
steps.description: Comma-separated names. Everyone who shares the bill.

steps.title: ④ One person at a time
steps.description: Each payer logs their items. Running total shows on the right.

steps.title: ⑤ Add items
steps.description: Name + price. Tap ADD or press Enter on the price field.

steps.title: ⑥ Split shared food
steps.description: Check who shares an item. Enter the FULL price — we split it automatically.

steps.title: ⑦ Reconcile
steps.description: At the end, assigned totals must match the bill. Green = good. Amber = fix items.

steps.title: ⑧ Copy link
steps.description: Copy the session URL — bookmark it to restore everything later.

steps.title: ⑨ PDF & backup
steps.description: Create a formatted PDF or export JSON to share with friends.
